[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         margin: 0;

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <table class="summary" width="95%" >
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <th>Total files checked</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <th>Files with violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:number level="any" value="count(descendant::file)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:number level="any" value="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:number level="any" value="count(descendant::file[error])"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <hr align="left" width="95%" size="1"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <div class="violations">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <h2>Violations</h2>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <p>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:for-each select="file[error]">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </p>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 </div>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <hr align="left" width="95%" size="1"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <xsl:apply-templates select="error"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |             </table>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:for-each select="file[error]">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </p>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <p>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:for-each select="file[error]">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </p>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 </div>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <p>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:for-each select="file[error]">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </xsl:choose>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>

[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:number level="any" value="count(descendant::file[error])"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         </td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <hr align="left" width="95%" size="1"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                 <div class="violations">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <h2>Violations</h2>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                     <p>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                         <xsl:choose>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:when test="count(descendant::error) > 0">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <table class="filelist" width="95%">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>File</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <th>Total violations</th>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:for-each select="file[error]">
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <!-- sort by number of errors and then alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort data-type="number" order="descending" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <xsl:variable name="errors" select="count(descendant::error)"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         <tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><a href="#{generate-id(@name)}"><xsl:value-of select="@name"/></a></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                             <td><xsl:value-of select="$errors"/></td>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                         </tr>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     </xsl:for-each>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </table>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <!-- sort entries by file name alphabetically -->
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                     <xsl:sort select="@name"/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 </xsl:apply-templates>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 <p/>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:when>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             <xsl:otherwise>
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                                 No violations were found.
[build/Check and Test/Compile and Check Java]   |                             </xsl:otherwise>
